nasb.text: Then Esther summoned Hathach from the king’s eunuchs, whom the king had appointed to attend her, and ordered him to go to Mordecai to learn what this was and why it was.

esv.text: Then Esther called for Hathach, one of the king’s eunuchs, who had been appointed to attend her, and ordered him to go to Mordecai to learn what this was and why it was.

cnv.text: 以斯帖就把王派來侍候她的一個太監哈他革召了來，吩咐他到末底改那裡去，探聽這是甚麼一回事，又是為了甚麼緣故。

ccb.text: 于是，以斯帖把王派来服侍她的一个名叫哈他革的太监召来，叫他去见末底改，查明事情的原委。
